listings.title: Epson GT-S50 High-Speed Document Scanner - Excellent Condition
listings.body: Selling an Epson GT-S50 high-speed document scanner in excellent working condition. Great scanner for home office, law office, accounting, receipts, records, or digitizing paperwork. Features: Fast duplex scanning (scans both sides automatically) Automatic document feeder Great for PDFs, receipts, business records, and multi-page documents Compact desktop design USB connection Includes original power adapter Condition: Fully functional Clean overall condition Normal light cosmetic wear from use Ready to plug in and use Perfect for: Home office Attorneys Accountants/bookkeeping Scanning old records and paperwork Small business use Local pickup only.

listings.title: ASUS RT-AC86U Dual Band Gaming WiFi Router AC2900 - Excellent Condition
listings.body: Selling an ASUS dual-band WiFi router in excellent working condition. Router was recently removed from service after upgrading equipment and works perfectly. Features: Dual-band 2.4GHz + 5GHz WiFi Strong range and reliable performance Great for streaming, gaming, and home office use Multiple Gigabit Ethernet ports USB ports for printer/network sharing Includes original ASUS power adapter Condition: Fully functional Normal light cosmetic wear from use Factory reset and ready for setup Model year shown on unit: 2018 Perfect for: Home WiFi upgrade Gaming setup Work from home Access point or mesh setup Local pickup  only

listings.title: Black/Cream Fishman Fluence Single Coil Strat Pickups with Rechargeable Battery
listings.body: Hello! I am selling a set of Fishman Fluence single coils. Everything is already wired up except for the  stereo output jack (included) and the battery, which makes for a very easy install. This listing will include the 3 Fishman Fluence S pickups (pre-wired to pots, pickup switch, etc), a Squier Affinity Strat pickguard, 3 cream and 3 black Fishman pickup covers, stereo jack, and the Fishman rechargeable battery pack and charger Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks for looking!

listings.title: Black Fishman Fluence Modern Alnico Active Humbucker
listings.body: Hello. I am selling a Fishman Fluence Modern Alnico humbucker. This is the older 2 voice model. This one can still be coil-topped by utilizing the CT and H solder pads. This listing only includes the actual pickup and the necessary wires for the pickup Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks for looking!

listings.title: HUGE LOT of New York Collectibles
listings.body: These historical memorabilia collectibles are perfect for those interested in New York. Great for collectors to enjoy! * LOT of 4 Enamel New York Pins * 10 Central Park Conservancy Blank Note Cards with Envelopes Each Note Card Measures Approximately: 6.75” x 4.75” Condition: These note cards have never been used and are in pristine condition from a smoke-FREE home! What you will receive: (2) Springtime in the Park ~ Photo by: Elliot Stern (2) Cherry Hill Fountain ~ Photo by: Elliot Stern (2) Burnett Fountain ~ Photo by: Sara Cedar Miller (2) The Mall ~ Photo by: Zach Nelson (2) Bow Bridge ~ Photo by: Hideki Aono *The New York Landmarks Conservancy Post Cards *Lot of 15* Each Post Card Measures Approximately: 6” t x 4.5” W Condition: These postcards have never been used and are in pristine condition from a smoke-FREE home! The New York Landmarks Conservancy is a non-profit organization "dedicated to preserving, revitalizing, and reusing New York’s architecturally significant buildings." It provides technical assistance, project management services, grants, and loans to owners of historic properties in New York State. What you will receive: (5) Chrysler Building, 1930 (5) Flatiron Building, 1902 (5) Brooklyn Bridge, 1883 *Collection of Small Posters of The Statue of Liberty & Ellis Island: A Timeline & Statue of Liberty Museum Pamphlet (See pictures for full descriptions) Shipping available at buyer's expense.
